chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الْوَقْفِ وَ الصَّدَقَةِ وَ النُّحْلِ وَ الْهِبَةِ وَ السُّكْنَى وَ الْعُمْرَى وَ الرُّقْبَى وَ مَا لَا يَجُوزُ مِنْ ذَلِكَ عَلَى الْوَلَدِ وَ غَيْرِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – What is allowed from the endowment, and the charity, and the grant, and the gift, and the (provision) of habitation, and the lifetime (service) and the bondman, and what is allowed from that upon the child and others

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/58)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/58)
text: الرَّجُلِ يَتَصَدَّقُ بِالصَّدَقَةِ الْمُشْتَرَكَةِ قَالَ جَائِزٌ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad Al Asimy, from Ali Bin Al Hassan, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Muhammad Bin Humran, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man who gives charity with something which is a jointly owned. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allowed’.
en.sarwar: 26. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-‘Asemiy from Ali ibn al-Hassan from Ali ibn Asbat from Muhammad ibn Humran from Zurarah who has narrated the following: “About the case of a man who gives in charity what is owned in partnership, abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al- Salam, has said, ‘It is permissible.’”
